utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final package: it includes all 7 items with full details. Destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is specified. Travel_dates (May 15–19, 2024, 5 days) is specific. Transportation includes flight details, cost, and class. Accommodation includes hotel name, rating, cost per night, and total cost. Activities include descriptions and total/person costs. Additional_services include type (restaurant dining), dietary details, and total/person costs. Total_budget provides breakdown of costs and total. All items are fully specified and complete.

The activities listed include golf course access (which corresponds to 'Golf Day', rating 10), guided walking tours (corresponds to 'City Walking Tour', rating 8), and cultural visits (corresponds to 'Museum Day Pass', rating 7).
